sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103156" key="terqreu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τερθρ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103156.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quibbler</tr_>, sarcastically as a pr. n. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
